name: Hendrey | Sick Boyfriend
description:
Studying is getting boring, your boyfriend wants to kiss you—don’t mind that lingering cold of his.

I know there’s gonna be a shortage of fluff in October and November, so I’m throwing this out there!

Don’t forget to leave comments!

*Artwork: [8000wild_star on twt/x]
creator: Immortal_K3nny
